criteria: All 20 acquired source texts have been segmented and classified.
OCR-corrupt and context-fragment records remain quarantined.
Every runtime module has section, audience, tone, theme, seam, rights, and exact attribution review.
Precomposed featured-source sequences have passed narrative and ritual coherence review.
Representative generated Haggadahs have passed political, beginner-accessibility, print, and mobile QA.
note: Keep comprehensiveApproval false while the 40-record set is only a smoke-test fixture. Set it true only after the full segmented corpus and precomposed sequences pass the listed review.
